rag_slow: Retrieval latency spike. Students should find slow RAG span in trace.
tool_fail: Vector store or tool error. Students should identify error_type from logs.
cost_spike: Token usage spike. Students should explain higher output token cost.
db_timeout: Database connection timeout. Students should spot upstream timeout errors in traces.
rate_limit_exceeded: API rate limit hit. Logs should show 429 Too Many Requests from the LLM provider.
pii_leak: Sensitive data leaked in plain text. Students should identify missing scrubber coverage in JSON logs.
high_error_rate: Spike in general 500 errors. Students should trigger the high_error_rate alert rule.
